title: Crowd Control and Damage Over Time
introduction: Crowd-control effects restrict an enemy hero's ability to perform basic attacks, ultimate attacks or both.
Damage-over-time effects apply damage at the end of each round and can interact with specific stigmata, artifacts and hero abilities.

crowdControl.name: Stun
crowdControl.description: The affected hero cannot perform a basic attack or ultimate attack.

notes: The guide states that Toxic Mark is not officially counted as DOT.
Withering stigmata and Evil Dreadsword therefore do not affect it.

damageOverTime.name: Burn
damageOverTime.timing: Damage is applied at the end of each round.

dotInteractions.description: Increases damage dealt by DOT effects.
Increases damage dealt by DOT effects.

Makes the equipped hero immune to DOT effects.
The guide identifies Ivy Belle as another DOT damage dealer.
